summary: Executed a synthetic ketamine RCT end-to-end (7 phases) as a Zed R/Python/Quarto verification exercise. Pipeline ran on base R + numpy/pandas only. Primary logistic regression OR (KAT vs TAU) = 3.29 (95% CI 1.57-6.89, p=0.002) on synthetic data. Discovered R environment is bare-base (no tidyverse/survival/gtsummary/mice/languageserver), Python missing scipy/statsmodels, and Quarto not installed. Produced a prioritized config gap log with nix remediation snippets as the primary deliverable.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary with toolchain scoreboard and consolidated gap list
Prioritized Zed R/Python/Quarto config gap remediation list with nix snippets

completion_data.completion_summary: Task 20 completed: synthetic RCT pipeline executed successfully as a Zed R/Python/Quarto toolchain verification on NixOS. All 7 phases finished with graceful fallbacks (base R only, no Quarto). Primary deliverable is the prioritized configuration gap log (logs/config_gaps.md) identifying missing R packages (tidyverse, survival, gtsummary, mice, languageserver), Python modules (scipy, statsmodels), and Quarto, with concrete nix remediation snippets and recommended Zed settings.json additions.
roadmap_items: Install R package set (tidyverse, survival, gtsummary, broom, mice, knitr, rmarkdown, languageserver, styler, lintr) via configuration.nix rWrapper
Install Python scientific extras (scipy, statsmodels, seaborn, scikit-learn, pyarrow) via nix profile
Install Quarto (pkgs.quarto) and verify rmarkdown/jupyter engines
Register r-languageserver in Zed settings.json and verify LSP features interactively
Create project-level flake.nix for reproducible per-task R/Python environments

next_steps: Apply HIGH-priority remediations from logs/config_gaps.md, then re-run task 20 scripts to confirm survival/gtsummary/quarto work end-to-end.
